framework: Next.js (confirmed via _next/static/chunks URLs, 53 inline scripts, 25 external scripts)
title: HappyRobot | AI workers handle end-to-end tasks at scale.
heroH1:
Put agents to work in
complex environments
heroSubhead: Power your operations with an AI workforce

heroVideo.note: Hero background is a full-bleed looping video, NOT canvas or WebGL

allHeadings.text:
Put agents to work in
complex environments
The limit of what AI can do in your enterprise is not the model. It's what the model knows about how your enterprise operates. That context is only captured one way: doing the work.
Agents are autonomous AI workers capable of communication and coordination
To put them to work means deploying at scale across core business functions
Complex environments are fragmented, operationally messy, exception-ridden enterprises
Scaling globally across regions and business units
Multi-agent system with custom control tower
Put agents to work in complex environments

ctas.text:
Customer Support
AI workers that resolve every contact

Operations
AI coordinators for schedules and flows

navLinks.text: Agents — The core of the platform
Context — What agents generate & learn from
Interfaces — How humans interact with agents
Logistics — AI quoting, tracking, and maintenance
Utilities — AI field, billing, and grid support
Airlines — AI crew, ops, and cargo support
Retail — AI that connects shelf to shopper
Manufacturing — AI tracking, procurement, and collections
Insurance — AI claims, policies and renewals
Customer Support — AI workers that resolve every contact
Sales — AI sellers that reengage and close
Finance — AI collectors that turn due into paid
Operations — AI coordinators for schedules and flows
HR & Recruiting — AI hiring and workforce coordination

heroSection.note: Hero background is a video; section bg is transparent over the video

darkSection.note: Large dark navy section for the manifesto quote H2

platformSection.note: Khaki/warm-beige background for the 'Agents need a platform' section

h1.note: Serif display font for hero H1 — Tobias (custom/licensed)

sections.contentGist: TRUSTED BY 150+ ENTERPRISES — logo strip of enterprise clients

sections.className: relative overflow-hidden flex items-center py-24 md:py-32 min-h-[50vh] bg-hr-dark-navy
sections.firstHeading: The limit of what AI can do in your enterprise is not the model. It's what the model knows about how your enterprise operates. That context is only captured one way: doing the work.
sections.contentGist: Full-width dark navy manifesto block — single H2 as large editorial statement
HappyRobot helps enterprises put agents to work in complex environments — three definition cards explaining Agents, Deployment at scale, Complex environments
paras: HappyRobot helps enterprises put agents to work in complex environments

sections.contentGist: Three platform pillars: Agent behavior is evaluated / Agents collect & learn from context / Humans interact with agents
paras: The platform starts with agents that are constantly evaluated against technical and behavioral benchmarks.
Real-world experience builds context that is leveraged for insight and constant improvement.
Custom interfaces fit to your ways of working surface insight and enable collaboration with your AI team.

sections.label: OUR RESULTS
sections.contentGist: Our focus is on deployments in complex enterprises. We've been battle-tested in high-stakes environments full of exceptions and real consequences when things go wrong. We've taken AI out of the lab and into the field.

customerStories.h3: Scaling globally across regions and business units
Multi-agent system with custom control tower

sections.contentGist: Three impact attributes: Custom / Complex / Multi-function. Supporting para: 'Achieving enterprise super intelligence requires a platform built to learn through execution and the deployment rigor to put it inside real workflows. At HappyRobot, both are built to compound - so every deployment makes the system smarter than the last.'

sections.firstHeading: Put agents to work in complex environments
sections.contentGist: Closing CTA section repeating hero headline with 'Book a demo' button

animLib: CSS transitions + Tailwind utility classes (transition-opacity, transition-colors, duration-*) + hero background video loop; no standalone JS animation library detected (no gsap, framer-motion, lottie, anime, THREE, Lenis, etc. on window or in network script names)

imagery.note: Hero video is a sibling/child of the hero container but not detected inside the first <section>. Full-bleed background video: https://happyrobot.b-cdn.net/HappyRobot_HeroLoop_v01_up.mp4 (autoplay, muted, loop)

footerText: Product: Platform overview, Agents, Governance, Context, Interfaces, Security & reliability, Developer tools. Company: Blog, Hub, Careers, Media Kit. Terms & Policies: Terms of service, Privacy policy, Cookie policy. Social: LinkedIn, X. Tagline: 'Intelligence that runs your operations.' © 2026 HappyRobot Inc.

technicalNotes.styling: Tailwind CSS with custom design tokens (bg-hr-dark-navy, bg-hr-cargo-khaki, bg-hr-hull-white, bg-hr-harbor-gray, bg-hr-anchor-black)
technicalNotes.colorScheme: Light theme — near-white #FCFCFC base with dark navy accent section and khaki/warm-beige platform section
technicalNotes.heroMechanism: Full-bleed looping mp4 video background (CDN: happyrobot.b-cdn.net), not canvas or WebGL
